name: Eggplant with Chicken (or Tofu)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 pound boneless chicken breast (or 1/4 lb. tofu)
3 red chili peppers, seeded and chopped
2 teaspoons yellow bean sauce (Yellow bean sauce from Thailand is saltier than sauce from Hong Kong or China. Season to taste.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice unpeeled eggplant crosswise into slices about 1/8-inch thick.
2. Thinly slice chicken (or cut tofu into 1/2-inch cubes).
3. Heat oil in a wok; add garlic and stir fry until light brown.
4. Add eggplant and chicken (or tofu) to the wok and cook for 5 to 7 minutes.
5. Add red chili peppers, basil leaves, and yellow bean sauce; mix well.
6. Serve immediately, as eggplant and basil will turn dark if the dish sits after cooking.
